location: U.S. Consulate General Sydney, New South Wales, Australia
text: NBC: Epstein victim told FBI in 2011 Sydney interview she was directed to have sex with Dershowitz, Prince Andrew, Richardson, Mitchell, Dubin, Brunel

location: Palm Beach County Sheriff's Office, West Palm Beach FL
text: Sheriff Bradshaw announces PBSO internal investigation into deputies who monitored Epstein during work-release, July 2019
2024: Woman at MIA Terminal J told CBP she was an 'FBI Victim' connected to Epstein; HSI dispatched to interview her.

location: Palm Beach County Jail, West Palm Beach FL
text: Epstein spent weekends incarcerated at Palm Beach County Jail during work release, traveling freely during the week.
Staff alert asks if actor Gerard Butler can join Epstein for dinner at 7pm, March 15, 2018
